title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Atos India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at Atos India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Atos India Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Bengaluru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Atos India Advisory Limited:
Atos India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India Advisory Limited!
